title: AI Builders Digest
subtitle: Bilingual edition · 双语对照版

intro.text: 今天这批内容有几条放在一起看特别有意思。Matt Turck 用一篇讽刺小品画出了 2026 年 VC 的日常——从早到晚围着 Anthropic/OpenAI 转。Garry Tan 说 Opus 4.8 配 OpenClaw 非常厉害，同时技术债务的借口也死了——AI 让依赖升级几乎免费。Dan Shipper 推荐了一篇关于 tokenmaxxing 恐慌为什么不会持久的分析。Peter Yang 推荐 Google 免费的 5 天 agent 课程，上期 150 万人学。Steipete 说「clanker 不是侮辱，vibe coding 才是」——162 个赞，开发者社区的幽默感在线。

archive.title: Token 生态日报
archive.desc: VC 生态全面围绕 foundation model 公司运转、token 成本恐慌被冷静看待、Google 推出免费 agent 课程、Opus 4.8 大幅提升协作体验。

footerNote: Source: Follow Builders curated daily digest. Rebuilt from the 2026-05-29 source feeds.

sections.title: The VC Ecosystem in 2026 / 2026 年的 VC 生态
sections.desc: Matt Turck 用一篇讽刺小品画出了一张非常准确的行业快照。

rewrite: Matt Turck's viral 619-like post is a satirical day-in-the-life of a VC in 2026. Board meeting at 9am: main value-add is pushing Anthropic/OpenAI usage. Lunch at 1pm: discussing blue ocean away from Anthropic/OpenAI, conclude to invest directly. Pitch at 3pm: founder runs on both. Due diligence at 4:30pm: ask Claude and ChatGPT if they'll build this startup—both say yes, pass. 6pm: help portfolio CTO upgrade Anthropic tier. 8pm: brainstorming podcast guests from Anthropic and OpenAI.
The piece works because every detail is recognizable. The entire VC value chain has reoriented around foundation model companies.
original: A day in the life of a VC in 2026: 9am Board meeting, pushing for Anthropic/OpenAI usage, briefly ponder how I became an SDR for foundation model companies. 1pm Lunch, discussing blue ocean away from Anthropic/OpenAI, conclude we should probably just invest directly. 3pm Pitch meeting, founder runs on both. 4:30pm Due diligence, ask Claude and ChatGPT if they'll build this startup natively—both say yes, I pass. 6pm Urgent call to help portco upgrade Anthropic tier. 8pm Brainstorming podcast guests from Anthropic and OpenAI.

rewrite: Matt Turck 这条 619 赞的爆款帖是一篇讽刺版的「2026 年 VC 的一天」。早上 9 点开董事会，核心 value-add 是推动用 Anthropic/OpenAI——反思自己怎么变成了 foundation model 公司的 SDR。中午跟另一个 VC 吃饭讨论蓝海，结论是直接投 Anthropic/OpenAI。下午看项目，创始人说 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 都用。做尽调时问 Claude 和 ChatGPT 会不会在下个版本做这个产品——都说会，pass。晚上帮 portfolio 公司升级 Anthropic tier，想播客嘉宾还是 Anthropic 和 OpenAI。
这篇之所以好，是因为每个细节都让人觉得「对，就是这样」。整个 VC 价值链已经围绕 foundation model 公司重新定向了。
original: Turck 讽刺小品：VC 一天从推 Anthropic/OpenAI 开始，到午饭讨论蓝海（结论直接投），到尽调问 Claude/ChatGPT（都说会做，pass），到帮 portco 升 Anthropic tier，到播客嘉宾想请 Anthropic/OpenAI。619 赞。

sections.title: Model Progress & the Token Economy / 模型进步与 Token 经济
sections.desc: 模型在变强、token 在变贵，但有人冷静地指出恐慌不会持续。

rewrite: Garry Tan gives a direct product endorsement: Opus 4.8 is fucking awesome with OpenClaw. It's much more clear about its fixes, what it's thinking, and how it works with you to fix problems. 618 likes confirms this is a meaningful upgrade in the agent collaboration experience.
original: Have to report: Opus 4.8 is fucking awesome with OpenClaw. It's much more clear about its fixes, what it's thinking, and how it works with you to fix problems.

rewrite: Garry Tan 给了一个很直接的产品评价：Opus 4.8 配 OpenClaw 非常厉害。它对自己的修复、思考过程、以及怎么跟你协作解决问题，表达更清晰了。618 个赞说明这不是随口一说，而是 agent 协作体验的实质性提升。
original: Garry Tan 说 Opus 4.8 配 OpenClaw 非常厉害，修复更清晰、思考更透明、协作更好。618 赞。

rewrite: Dan Shipper points to an extremely smart take on the tokenmaxxing panic and why it won't last. The implication: current token cost anxiety is a temporary phase, not a structural constraint.
original: Extremely smart take on the tokenmaxxing panic and why it won't last.

rewrite: Dan Shipper 推荐了一篇关于 tokenmaxxing 恐慌的分析，说这篇写得非常聪明，并解释了为什么这种恐慌不会持续。暗示：当前的 token 成本焦虑是一个暂时阶段，不是结构性约束。
original: Dan Shipper 推荐了一篇关于 tokenmaxxing 恐慌为什么不会持久的分析。158 赞。

rewrite: Nikunj Kothari observes that if you're seeing revenue explode for application startups, it's because a lot of them are trying to get into the token path as quickly as possible. His wry addendum: margins are a different story though.
This pairs with Matt Turck's satire: everyone is rushing to become a token intermediary, but the economics of that position may not be sustainable.
original: If you are seeing revenue explode for application startups, it's because a lot of them are trying to get into the token path as quickly as possible. Margins are a different story though.

rewrite: Nikunj Kothari 观察到，如果你看到应用型创业公司的收入在爆发，那是因为很多公司在拼命想进入 token 流通路径。但他补了一句：利润率就是另一回事了。
这和 Matt Turck 的讽刺配合得很好：所有人都在冲着成为 token 中间商去，但这个位置的经济学可能并不持续。
original: Nikunj 说收入爆发的 app startup 很多是因为想进 token 路径，但利润率是另一回事。

sections.title: Tech Debt, Upgrades & the New Default / 技术债务、升级与新默认值
sections.desc: 当 AI 让依赖升级几乎免费时，「以后再说」的借口就不存在了。

rewrite: Garry Tan declares that the 'we will upgrade the dependencies later' excuse just died. When AI makes library upgrades nearly free, staying current stops being a luxury and becomes the default. His thesis: tech debt was always a tooling problem, and now it's a thing of the past.
original: The 'we will upgrade the dependencies later' excuse just died. When AI makes library upgrades nearly free, staying current stops being a luxury and becomes the default. Tech debt was always a tooling problem and now it's a thing of the past.

rewrite: Garry Tan 宣布「以后再升级依赖」的借口已经死了。当 AI 让库升级几乎免费时，保持最新不再是奢侈，而是默认选项。他的论点：技术债务从来都是工具问题，现在它已经变成过去式了。
original: Garry Tan 说「以后再升级依赖」的借口死了。AI 让升级几乎免费，保持最新变成默认。技术债务是工具问题，现在是过去式。

sections.title: Learning & Building at Scale / 大规模学习与构建
sections.desc: Google 免费 agent 课程、Replit Canvas 多模态平台——AI 构建的门槛正在快速降低。

rewrite: Peter Yang highlights Google's free 5-day AI Agents course, now focused on vibe coding with agents. The last edition had 1.5M learners. Day 1: agents + vibe coding with Google Agents CLI. Day 2: tools + interop. Day 3: memory + context. Day 4: quality + security. Day 5: prototype to production. 1-2 hours a day, taught by Google engineers, free.
803 likes signals massive mainstream demand for practical agent building skills.
original: Google's free 5-day AI Agents course is back, and this time it's all about vibe coding with agents. The last one had 1.5M learners.
Day 1: Agents + vibe coding. Day 2: Tools + interop. Day 3: Memory + context. Day 4: Quality + security. Day 5: Prototype to production. 1-2 hours a day, taught by Google engineers, free.

rewrite: Peter Yang 推荐 Google 免费的 5 天 AI Agents 课程，这次主打 vibe coding with agents。上一期有 150 万学习者。Day 1：agent + vibe coding。Day 2：工具 + 互操作。Day 3：记忆 + 上下文。Day 4：质量 + 安全。Day 5：从原型到生产。每天 1-2 小时，Google 工程师授课，免费。
803 个赞，说明主流市场对实用 agent 构建技能有巨大需求。
original: Google 免费 5 天 AI Agents 课程回归，主打 vibe coding。上期 150 万学习者。覆盖 agent、工具、记忆、安全、部署。免费。803 赞。

rewrite: Peter Steinberger's one-liner is pure developer humor: 'clanker' is not a slur. 'vibe coding' is. 162 likes from a community that takes both terms seriously enough to debate which is more offensive.
original: 'clanker' is not a slur. 'vibe coding' is.

rewrite: Peter Steinberger 的一行梗是纯开发者幽默：「clanker」不是侮辱，「vibe coding」才是。162 个赞，来自一个把这两个词都认真对待到要争论哪个更 offensive 的社区。
original: Steipete：「clanker」不是侮辱，「vibe coding」才是。162 赞。
